name: Georgia Boy's Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine confectioners' sugar and peanut butter in a small bowl.
3. Sprinkle half of the peanut butter mixture on the bottom of the pastry shell.
4. In a medium saucepan, stir together sugar, cornstarch, flour, and salt.
5. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until smooth.
6. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce to medium-low.
7. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
8. Remove from heat and gradually stir in egg yolks; return mixture to saucepan.
9. Return to a boil over medium-low heat, cooking for 2 more minutes.
10. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla.
11. Pour filling over peanut butter mixture in the pastry shell.
12. Spread meringue on top of the hot filling.
13. Carefully seal the edge of the crust to prevent shrinking.
14. Sprinkle remaining peanut butter mixture over the meringue.
15. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Cool completely on a wire rack before serving or refrigerating.
